Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class AudiosphereIrConfig

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
  • public class AudiosphereIrConfig
extends java.lang.Object
    Configuration for the Audiosphere feature.

    The AudiosphereIrConfig class encapsulates all parameters required to configure the
    IAudiosphereIrCapability.

    Changes to an instance of this class do not take effect immediately. The updated configuration must be applied
    by calling IAudiosphereIrCapability::set_config().

      void setPresence​(short presence)
      Sets the presence level

      The valid range is 0 to AudiosphereIrConfig::get_max_presence().
      Values outside the valid range will be clamped.
      void setRoomId​(short room_id)
      Sets the active room configuration

      The room ID refers to a predefined configuration built into the firmware.
      void setSpeakerAngle​(SpeakerPosition position, short angle_degrees)
      Sets the angular position of a speaker relative to the listener

      The valid range is -180 to 180 degrees.
      void setSpeakerAnglesDerivedFromFrontRight​(short angle_degrees)
      Sets all the angular positions for all four speakers derived from the front right angle

      This sets all four angles based on Audiodo's default recommendation.
      The valid range is 0 to 90 degrees.
      void setSpeakerConstellation​(SpeakerConstellation constellation)
      Sets the active speaker constellation

      Selects which predefined speaker layout configuration to use.
      void setSpeakerGain​(SpeakerPosition position, short gain_percent)
      Sets the gain level of a speaker

      The valid range is 0-100.
      void setWallsPresent​(boolean walls_present)
      Enables or disables the presence of walls

    • Constructor Detail

                              boolean cMemoryOwn)

      • AudiosphereIrConfig

        public AudiosphereIrConfig()
        Construct a new default AudiosphereIrConfig object.

      • AudiosphereIrConfig

        public AudiosphereIrConfig​(short presence,
                           short room_id,
                           boolean walls_present,
                           SpeakerConstellation constellation,
                           short angle_front_left,
                           short angle_front_right,
                           short angle_rear_left,
                           short angle_rear_right,
                           short gain_front_left,
                           short gain_front_right,
                           short gain_rear_left,
                           short gain_rear_right)
        Construct a new AudiosphereIrConfig object with data.

        Parameters:
        presence - The desired presence level.
        room_id - The room configuration to activate.
        walls_present - True if walls should be present, false otherwise.
        constellation - The speaker constellation to use.
        angle_front_left - The desired angle of the front left speaker.
        angle_front_right - The desired angle of the front right speaker.
        angle_rear_left - The desired angle of the rear left speaker.
        angle_rear_right - The desired angle of the rear right speaker.
        gain_front_left - The desired gain of the front left speaker.
        gain_front_right - The desired gain of the front right speaker.
        gain_rear_left - The desired gain of the rear left speaker.
        gain_rear_right - The desired gain of the rear right speaker.

      • delete

        public void delete()

      • setPresence

        public void setPresence​(short presence)
        Sets the presence level

        The valid range is 0 to AudiosphereIrConfig::get_max_presence().
        Values outside the valid range will be clamped.

        Parameters:
        presence - The desired presence level.

      • setRoomId

        public void setRoomId​(short room_id)
        Sets the active room configuration

        The room ID refers to a predefined configuration built into the firmware.

        Parameters:
        room_id - The room configuration to activate.

      • setWallsPresent

        public void setWallsPresent​(boolean walls_present)
        Enables or disables the presence of walls

        Parameters:
        walls_present - True if walls should be present, false otherwise.

      • setSpeakerConstellation

        public void setSpeakerConstellation​(SpeakerConstellation constellation)
        Sets the active speaker constellation

        Selects which predefined speaker layout configuration to use.

        Parameters:
        constellation - The speaker constellation to use.

      • setSpeakerAngle

        public void setSpeakerAngle​(SpeakerPosition position,
                            short angle_degrees)
        Sets the angular position of a speaker relative to the listener

        The valid range is -180 to 180 degrees. Values outside the valid range will be clamped.

        The listener is assumed to be positioned at the center of the coordinate system,
        facing 0 degrees. An angle of 0 degrees places the speaker directly in front
        of the listener.

        Example: For a symmetrical four-speaker constellation with a front spread
        of 20 degrees:

        Front left: 20 degrees
        Front right: -20 degrees
        Rear left: 160 degrees
        Rear right: -160 degrees

        Parameters:
        position - The speaker position to configure.
        angle_degrees - The desired angle in degrees.

      • setSpeakerAnglesDerivedFromFrontRight

        public void setSpeakerAnglesDerivedFromFrontRight​(short angle_degrees)
        Sets all the angular positions for all four speakers derived from the front right angle

        This sets all four angles based on Audiodo's default recommendation.
        The valid range is 0 to 90 degrees. Values outside the valid range will be clamped.

        The listener is assumed to be positioned at the center of the coordinate system,
        facing 0 degrees. An angle of 0 degrees places the speaker directly in front
        of the listener.

        Example: For a symmetrical four-speaker constellation with a front right speaker at 20 degrees:

        Front left: -20 degrees
        Front right: 20 degrees
        Rear left: -160 degrees
        Rear right: 160 degrees

        Parameters:
        angle_degrees - The desired front right angle in degrees.

      • setSpeakerGain

        public void setSpeakerGain​(SpeakerPosition position,
                           short gain_percent)
        Sets the gain level of a speaker

        The valid range is 0-100. Values outside the valid range will be clamped.

        Parameters:
        position - The speaker position to configure.
        gain_percent - The desired gain in percent.

      • getSpeakerAngle

        public short getSpeakerAngle​(SpeakerPosition position)
        Returns the current angle of a specific speaker

        See AudiosphereIrConfig::set_speaker_angle() for details on the coordinate system and
        value conventions.

        Parameters:
        position - The speaker position to get the angle for.
        Returns:
        The current speaker angle in degrees.

      • getSpeakerGain

        public short getSpeakerGain​(SpeakerPosition position)
        Returns the current gain of a specific speaker

        Parameters:
        position - The speaker position to get the gain for.
        Returns:
        The current speaker gain as a percentage.
